name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_sht_uvw_job
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_sht' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_job' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`DeltaUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ModifiedUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CreatedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ScheduledStart` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ScheduledEnd` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CompletedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ApprovalDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`AssignedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CompletedStatus` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CreatedUser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CompletedUser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`MadeSafeDateUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ComplianceCalculationDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CRMField6` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`DeltaUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ModifiedUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CreatedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ScheduledStart` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ScheduledEnd` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CompletedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ApprovalDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`AssignedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CompletedStatus` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CreatedUser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CompletedUser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`MadeSafeDateUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ComplianceCalculationDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CRMField6` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'DeltaUTC|ModifiedUTC|CreatedDate|DueDate|ScheduledStart|ScheduledEnd|CompletedDate|ApprovalDate|AssignedDate|CompletedStatus|CreatedUser|CompletedUser|MadeSafeDateUTC|ComplianceCalculationDate|CRMField6' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_sht`.`uvw_job`
